scripts.test:layer1: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer1*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer2: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer2*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer3: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer3*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer4: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer4*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer5: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer5*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer6: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer6*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer7: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer7*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer8: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer8*.test.ts'
scripts.test:layer9: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'cd apps/api && pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/layer9*.test.ts'
scripts.check:trpc-parity: VITEST_SKIP_GLOBAL_MIGRATE=1 pnpm --filter @nexusops/api exec vitest run src/__tests__/trpc-web-parity.test.ts
scripts.docker:test:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait
